life.qbic.cli

Class ToolExecutor

  • java.lang.Object
    • life.qbic.cli.ToolExecutor

  • public class ToolExecutor
extends Object
    Class that coordinates execution of generic command-line QBiCTools. In order to be able to write "generic" code that can run "any" tool, we have decided to use the Strategy design pattern. This class represents the Context (i.e., command-line tools and services).

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static String DEFAULT_NAME 
      static String DEFAULT_REPO 
      static String DEFAULT_VERSION 
      static String TOOL_PROPERTIES_PATH

      Extracts tool name, version and repository URL from TOOL_PROPERTIES_PATH.

    • Constructor Detail

        public ToolExecutor()

    • Method Detail

      • invoke

        public <T extends AbstractCommand> void invoke(Class<? extends QBiCTool<T>> toolClass,
                                               Class<T> commandClass,
                                               String[] args)
        Invokes the given QBiCTool.
        Parameters:
        toolClass - the class of the tool to invoke.
        commandClass - the class of the commands that the tool is able to understand.
        args - the provided command-line arguments.

      • validateParametersAndParseCommandlineArguments

        protected AbstractCommand validateParametersAndParseCommandlineArguments(Class<?> toolClass,
                                                                         Class<? extends AbstractCommand> commandClass,
                                                                         String[] args)
        Validates that the passed parameters are not null and parses the given args as a command of the class commandClass.
        Parameters:
        toolClass - the class of the tool that will be executed.
        commandClass - the class of the commands that will be parsed.
        args - the command-line arguments.
        Returns:
        the parsed command.

      • handleCommonParameters

        protected boolean handleCommonParameters(ToolMetadata toolMetadata,
                                         AbstractCommand command)
        Handles the standard and --version parameters which all QBiCTool are able to handle.
        Parameters:
        toolMetadata - the metadata of the tool.
        command - the command.
        Returns:
        true if either help or version (or both!) were requested, false otherwise.

      • extractToolMetadata

        protected ToolMetadata extractToolMetadata()
        Extracts tool name, version and repository URL from TOOL_PROPERTIES_PATH. If the file does not exist, is corrupt or properties are missing, this method will only generate warnings in the log file and use the following default values:
        • Default name if property tool.name is missing: DEFAULT_NAME
        • Default version if property tool.version is missing: DEFAULT_VERSION
        • Default repository URL if property tool.repo.url is missing: DEFAULT_REPO
        Returns:
        the parsed ToolMetadata.
